song.title: Complete
song.author: Andrew Ulugia
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G D Em Here I am oh God . C D G I bring this sacrifice . D Em My open heart . C D Em I offer up my life . C2 Em I look to You Lord . C2 G2/B Your love that never ends . C2 D Restores me again.
[C] . G Em C2 D So I lift my eyes to You Lord . G Em C2 In Your strength I will break through Lord .D D7/D# Em Bm G C Touch me____now, let Your grace fall down on me . Am C D I feel Your love dispel all my fears|| . G Em C2 D Through the storm I will hold on Lord . G Em C2 And by faith I will walk on Lord .D D7/D# Em Bm G C Then I’ll see beyond my calvary one day . Am D G And I will be complete in You.
